description_long: This is a standard traffic cone, predominantly orange with two wide, horizontal white reflective stripes encircling its upper section. The cone has a classic conical shape, tapering smoothly from a broad, square base to a rounded tip. The base is flat, slightly flared, and appears sturdy, designed to provide stability and prevent tipping. The surface of the cone is semi-soft and slightly matte, typical of flexible plastic or rubber used for impact resistance. There are no visible logos, text, or additional markings on the exterior. The overall condition appears new, with no signs of wear, dirt, or damage.
description: A bright orange traffic cone with two white reflective stripes and a wide, stable square base. The surface is clean, semi-soft, and free of markings or damage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height, both white stripes, and the square base clearly.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, still showing both stripes and the base, with minimal change in visible features.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, nearly identical to the previous, with both stripes and the base visible.
description_view_3: Final rotated view, showing the same features as other views, with the stripes and base clearly visible.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, horizontal white reflective stripes encircle the upper half of the cone, evenly spaced and of equal width.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, solid, and orange, with no attachments or distinctive features.
attribute_base_design: The base is square, flat, and slightly flared, made of thicker material for stability, and appears solid with no visible patterns or textures.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible.
attribute_condition: The object appears new, with a clean surface and no visible wear, fading, cracks, or damage.
